hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null; if [ -f package.json ] && [ ! -d node_modules ]; then echo 'spicet-app: installing dependencies (node_modules missing)...'; npm install --no-audit --no-fund >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'spicet-app: dependencies ready.' || echo 'spicet-app: npm install failed — run it manually.'; fi
